summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for DoppelCrush. All 18 pytest tests passed (100%) covering health, auth (signup/login/me), onboarding, mode toggle, discover ranking (doppel & chaos), looking_for filter, swipe/match auto-pairing on seed profiles, swipe exclusion in discover, matches listing, share counter increment, and referral code lookup + ref-bonus on signup.

minor.issue: Accepts raw `dict` body instead of a Pydantic model — works but loses input validation/schema docs.
Always grants +1 extra_daily_matches with no daily cap or per-target dedup — could be farmed by repeated calls.
No uniqueness constraint on (user_id,target_id); a user can swipe the same target multiple times and inflate swipe history (auto-match dedupe is handled, but swipes collection grows).
Filters out candidates without embedding/photo silently. If a real user finishes onboarding without a photo_url they will never appear; acceptable but worth a note.
Seed insert uses `id: uuid.uuid4()` each cold start but skips when email exists — fine; however referral_code is regenerated only on first insert which is correct. No issue.

action_items: Consider converting PATCH /api/me/mode body to a Pydantic model (e.g. ModeIn) for proper validation.
Consider rate-limiting/daily-capping POST /api/share to prevent extra_daily_matches farming.
Optionally add unique index on swipes (user_id,target_id) so repeat swipes are no-ops.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret is loaded from env correctly; bcrypt used for password hashing — good.
MongoDB _id is excluded from all responses via projection — good.
Cosine similarity implementation is correct; doppel sorts desc, chaos asc — verified by tests.
Auth dependency raises 401 on missing/invalid token consistently — verified.
Seed profiles loaded at startup with deterministic 128-dim normalized embeddings — verified.
CORS uses allow_credentials=True with `*` origin (default) — fine for dev but should set explicit origins for prod (CORS_ORIGINS supported).
seed_data_creation: Server auto-seeds 12 profiles at startup; tests rely on those.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_doppelcrush.py covers all 18 endpoints/flows listed in the review request. Uses timestamped emails for uniqueness. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set or it reads /app/frontend/.env automatically. Frontend (face-api.js client-side embedding) was not tested per request.
